Meaning.Vi: Sơn; chất sơn; bức tranh (nghệ thuật)
Meaning.En: A colored liquid or paste used to coat surfaces, or a picture made with pigments; also, the act of applying such a substance.
Meaning.Example: She chose a soft blue paint for the nursery walls.

Situation.Vi: Mua sơn để sơn lại tường nhà.
Situation.En: Buying paint to repaint the walls of a room.

Situation.Vi: Ngắm một bức tranh sơn dầu nổi tiếng.
Situation.En: Admiring a famous oil painting in a museum.

Meaning.Vi: Sơn (màu lên bề mặt); vẽ (tranh); tô màu
Meaning.En: To cover a surface with pigment in the form of paint; to create a picture using paint.
Meaning.Example: He spent the weekend painting the fence.

Situation.Vi: Tự sơn lại phòng khách vào cuối tuần.
Situation.En: DIY painting the living room over a weekend.

Situation.Vi: Hoạ sĩ đang vẽ chân dung bằng sơn dầu.
Situation.En: The artist is painting a portrait using oil paints.
